summary: Complete 5-step discover-plan-execute-verify-submit autonomous loop with issue linkage (run→issue_id), issue status transitions (in_progress→done or in_review), activity events (run_started, run_completed, approval_required, run_failed), and approval lifecycle (pending approval creation, approval_pending run status). All evidence shares coherent company/agent/issue/run IDs. 16 new tests plus 27 existing tests pass.

codeQuality.structure: Well-organized with clear separation: helper functions (createActivityEvent, updateIssueStatus, createApproval), main loop (runAutonomousLoop), step dispatcher, and individual step implementations. Comprehensive JSDoc documentation throughout.
codeQuality.security: No secrets in the loop. All DB operations through existing Supabase client. Authority policy correctly gates approval vs auto-submit behavior.
codeQuality.testCoverage: 16 new tests covering: issue linkage (4), activity events (3), approval lifecycle (5), shared ID coherence (1), authority policy defaults (1), and type exports (2). 43 total tests pass.
codeQuality.patterns: Follows existing patterns for Supabase inserts/updates. Activity events and execution logs use consistent naming. Step implementations return structured data for downstream consumption.

issues.description: The step implementations (discover, plan, execute, verify) use simulated/placeholder logic rather than real LLM calls. This is appropriate for the mission's validation scope but should be noted for any future real agent execution work.
issues.suggestedFix: Future milestone could wire real LLM/tool calls into the step functions while preserving the surrounding loop structure.
